description_long: This is a cylindrical spice container from the brand Ducros, labeled 'Mélange Malin Persillade.' The container features a prominent pink cap on top, a black body, and a colorful label with images of parsley and garlic, indicating its contents. The label wraps around the midsection, with the brand and product name clearly visible on the front. The container appears to be made of plastic, with a screw-on or snap-on cap for dispensing the spice mix. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, suitable for easy handling and storage. The object is likely filled with a spice blend, making it a practical item for kitchen or dining use.
description: A cylindrical Ducros Persillade spice container with a pink cap, black body, and a colorful label featuring parsley and garlic. The design is compact and practical for kitchen use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Ducros label, product name, and images of parsley and garlic clearly on the container.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible, showing the edge of the product name and some ingredient imagery.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, with the label and branding clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, with the label partially visible and the pink cap prominent.
